sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἄρωμα

- Transliteration: Aroma

- Phonetic: ar'-o-mah

- Definition:

1. spice, perfume

- Origin: from G142 (in the sense of sending off scent)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: From G142 (in the sense of sending off scent); an aromatic: - (sweet) spice.
